composer_note_for_claude: Verdi was a secular Italian opera composer; the Requiem is operatic and dramatic, written in memory of Manzoni in 1874. Mention the Manzoni context. Emphasize the operatic dimension vs Mozart's liturgical austerity.
audience: Iranian-Canadian audience; secular spiritual register, not Shia-religious. Persian translations should use Avestan/pure-Persian vocabulary where possible (روان not روح, گذر not عبور).

movements.mood_hint: terrifying, operatic, the most famous Dies Irae in the repertoire
